ops.title: GC: keep-set ignores closed-round history assets of open subjects
ops.description: Phase 7 review (2026-07-19, adversarially confirmed): internal/daemon/gc.go:39 builds the asset keep-set only from each open subject's live document (st.Doc.Blocks), ignoring assets referenced solely by closed-round snapshots in st.Rounds.History. A revision that swaps an image out mid-session lets the historical asset be collected after grace while the subject is still open, breaking round-history rendering. Deferred from the decision-board program release — fix: extend the keep-set walk over Rounds.History block snapshots (reuse assetSrcPtrs/doc.Visuals).

ops.text: gcAssets keeps assets referenced only by closed-round history of open subjects; regression test with a swapped-out image surviving GC grace
